proposal.story: CHARACTER_A discovers a minor 0.05-second deviation in her digital Earl Grey tea timer. Rather than ignoring it and drinking the tea, she immediately maps out a brand history timeline and spreadsheet to investigate the manufacturer's clock crystal reliability, completely ignoring a building fire alarm evacuation around her.
proposal.tone: Dry, deadpan, analytical obsession. The humor is derived from her calm intensity in the face of minor anomalies and complete obliviousness to real chaos.
themes: Thermal dynamics of Earl Grey tea

panels.keyframe_action: Emily is peering through magnifying glasses at a clean glass thermometer submerged in a tea cup, next to a blinking digital timer displaying 03:59.95.

captions: Emily knew that Earl Grey at 94.2°C reached peak flavor at exactly 240 seconds.

panels.keyframe_action: Emily sits at her pristine, color-coded desk. On her laptop screen is an intricate spreadsheet with red highlighted cells. In the background, office flashing warning lights pulse, and colleagues walk past her toward the exit.

character_choreography.expression_override: Mild analytical irritation, eyes fixed on laptop screen

captions: A 0.05-second variance was not just a mistake. It was a betrayal.

speech_balloons.text: Statistically... it points to a faulty clock crystal oscillator.

panels.keyframe_action: A wide angle showing Emily's teacup cold and untouched, while she starts sketching clock crystal diagrams on a chalkboard. The entire office space behind her is empty and dark.

captions: She still hadn't taken a single sip.

proposal.story: Marcus is trying to resolve a serious coolant leak in his vintage sports car using a banana peel as a makeshift gasket while having a heated phone argument with the local parking enforcement about the definition of 'temporary driveway obstruction'. The engine starts successfully but immediately triggers a tow truck's arrival.
proposal.tone: Kinetic, frantic energy, charming defiance. Humor stems from his absolute certainty in a ridiculous mechanical solution and his defensive, rapid-fire dialogue.

panels.keyframe_action: Marcus is leaned deep under the hood of a classic red sports convertible in a driveway, face smudged with grease. He holds a partially peeled banana, gesturing with it. A phone is on speakerphone resting on the air filter cover.

captions: Marcus didn't believe in instructions. He believed in structural organic materials.

speech_balloons.text: Listen, officer, a banana peel has excellent thermal resistance under pressure. It's basically rubber!

panels.keyframe_action: A close-up of a hand tightening a bolt over a yellow banana peel wedged into a metal pipe fitting. Steam is escaping from a tiny gap, but the yellow organic seal is holding.
Marcus wipes his hands on a rag, looking up with a grin as the car rumbles to life. Behind him, a tow truck has backed up to the front of his driveway, its yellow beacon lights flashing.

captions: Naturally, the car was parked across the sidewalk.

speech_balloons.text: Oh, perfect. A mobile lift service. Saved me a trip.
